title: cynometra sessiliflora
intro: Cynometra sessiliflora, also known as the bata or kamani tree, is a tropical plant species that belongs to the family of Sapindaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The extracts of Cynometra sessiliflora have been found to possess various health benefits, including antimicrobial and antioxidant properties, which help in reducing inflammation and fighting against infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are consumed to treat various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions.
